title: CKB LTD Foxsake Not You Again V2 Fox Themed Novelty Doormat Unique Joke Doormats Front Back Door Mats Made with a Non-slip PVC Backing, Natural Coir, Indoor Outdoor Size 60 x 40cm
features: Novelty door mats made from a high-quality tufted coconut fibre are perfect and durable mats for everyday use! Add some fun and style to your entrance and make your guests smile next time they visit.
Made with a non-slip PVC backing - Natural coir (coconut fibre)
Professionally dyed using exterior paint with the slogan: Foxsake Not You Again (Fox Themed)
Suitable for indoor & outdoor sheltered use - SIZE 60 x 40cm Thickness 1.5cm

Each mat is produced using a colour-dying process that ensures vibrant, long-lasting colour, so the text remains clear and lively over time. Suitable for sheltered outdoor or indoor use, this unique doormat is ideal for front porches, entryways, and mudrooms, adding both style and practicality to any space. Please note we don’t offer a personalised service for this product. Only sold with the text shown on the listing
